heading: Jurisdiction of district courts
label: 1708 Jurisdiction of district courts
text: The appropriate district court of the United States shall have and exercise jurisdiction of proceedings instituted under .section 1706 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective on and after sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 21, 1974section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380section 1221–1 of this title
